title: zelkova keaki
intro: Zelkova keaki, also known as the Hawaiian redbud, is a flowering tree native to Hawaii and the Society Islands, belonging to the Zelkova genus of plants. The Zelkova keaki tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, coughs, and skin conditions due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Zelkova keaki include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Zelkova keaki can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote health.
